task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented `PaymentService` with guild-scoped idempotent `request_payment`, confirmation queueing, fail-closed execution that persists `tx_signature` immediately on submission, manual-hold treatment for ambiguous send and confirmation-timeout states, and restart recovery that only retries the safe pre-submit crash case while holding ambiguous or unresolved submitted states. Verified with `python -m compileall src/features/payments/payment_service.py` and the full `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/test_social_publish_service.py -q` module.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `PaymentService` now enforces the fail-closed flow: duplicate requests resolve to the canonical `(producer, producer_ref, is_test)` row, test payments always use the fixed global token amount, non-test payments derive token amount from provider pricing, submitted signatures are persisted before confirmation is awaited, ambiguous send or post-submit timeout paths land in `manual_hold`, and restart recovery only requeues the safe no-signature pre-submit case while checking submitted signatures for confirm/fail/hold outcomes.
